perks.desc: Your equipped Hand Cannons fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.
Your equipped Sniper Rifles fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.
Your equipped Pulse Rifles fire disrupting rounds which stun the target, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage
Your equipped Submachine Guns fire disrupting rounds which stun the target, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant dama
Crossbows, and Bows that have been fully drawn for a short time, fire a powerful explosive payload that stuns unshielded combatants. Strong
Aiming down the sights of a Fusion Rifle or Linear Fusion Rifle for a short time loads a powerful payload that stuns unshielded combatants.
Your Machine Guns fire shield-piercing rounds and stun [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

Grants access to the Helmet mods: Kinetic/Void Siphon and Kinetic/Arc Siphon.

These mods combine two elemental siphons at a discounted cost
While you have an Arc or Void Super equipped, increase the maximum number of stacks of Armor Charge you can carry by 1.
Weapon final blows grant a stacking bonus to stability which resets on weapon reload or stow. Swords gain Guard Resistance.
If the first shot shortly after reloading or readying your weapon is a precision hit, gain flinch resistance.
Rapid final blows with a Kinetic weapon or a weapon matching your equipped Super create an Elemental pickup that matches your equipped Super
Sustained damage from Fusion Rifles, Linear Fusion Rifles, and Machine Guns grants those weapons bonus stability, range, and aim assist for
All Ammo Finder mods are discounted.
Breaking a combatant's shield grants increased weapon stability, handling, and reload speed. Swords gain increased guard resistance.
Sustained Kinetic weapon damage and rapid final blows have a chance to generate a unique ammo brick. Collecting this brick will grant ammo t
Precision hits with Bows and Sniper Rifles grant a stacking bonus to their reload speed.
Shortly after guarding with a Sword, your light and heavy attacks stun unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions
Rapid final blows against weakened combatants grant you Devour.
Finisher final blows grant grenade and melee energy.
Machine Gun rapid final blows heal you.

Defeating [Arc]Arc debuffed targets grants Bolt Charge.

Rapidly defeating Arc debuffed targets spawns an Orb of Power and heals a small por
Breaking a combatant's shield temporarily grants you damage resistance and increased melee damage.
When you or a member of your fireteam stuns a champion, you gain energy for your least-charged ability.
Briefly pause after executing a light attack, then follow it up with a light or heavy attack to empower your Sword for a short time, grantin
While you have a Void elemental buff, melee and Sword hits weaken targets, while melee and Sword final blows create a weakening burst.
Final blows on jolted combatants blind nearby combatants.
Precision final blows build progress towards a large Orb of Power that also grants bonus weapon damage on pickup. Higher ranked targets gran
[Arc]Arc weapon final blows have a chance to spawn an Arc Elemental Orb. Arc Orbs can be thrown or shot to create an Arc explosion that jolt
Kinetic weapon damage against a powerful combatant has a chance to create a Kinetic Rupture. Targeting this Rupture causes a damaging explos
Sniper Rifle hits grant stacking Sniper Rifle damage, stability, and reload bonuses for a short time. Heavy ammo Sniper Rifle hits count as
Performing three Sword light attacks followed by a heavy attack summons penumbral blades that surround you to damage and disorient combatant
Defeating a weakened target spawns a tracking projectile that weakens other targets.
Arc-powered melee hits jolt combatants and deal further damage for a short duration.
Arc Flux, Magnetic, and Fusion Grenades deal more damage when attached to combatants; on final blows, they release several micro-missiles th
